headline: 3 Reasons to Sell SHW and 1 Stock to Buy Instead
summary: Sherwin-Williams has been treading water for the past six months, recording a small loss of 2.2% while holding steady at $316.98. The stock also fell short of the S&P 500’s 8.5% gain during that period.
